WELCOME! CHENNAI/POLLACHI TFC TOGETHER IMAGE UPLOAD GUIDE
======================================================

You can upload your own images directly into the "public" folder of the project to replace any image on the website!

Simply name your images exactly as listed below and upload them:

1. HERO SECTION & BACKGROUND IMAGES:
   - Big Main Banner Image    ==> Name it exactly: hero.jpg
   - Custom Website Wallpaper ==> Name it exactly: background.jpg (Select "Custom Image Wallpaper" in our new live toolbar to activate!)

2. COACH / TRAINER IMAGES:
   - Coach 1 (K. Sundaram)    ==> Name it exactly: coach1.jpg
   - Coach 2 (Trainer Preethi)==> Name it exactly: coach2.jpg
   - Coach 3 (Trainer Vignesh)==> Name it exactly: coach3.jpg

3. KEY CAPABILITIES / SERVICES IMAGES:
   - Service 1 (Adaptive Gym) ==> Name it exactly: service1.jpg
   - Service 2 (Sensory Int.) ==> Name it exactly: service2.jpg
   - Service 3 (Hydro Therapy) ==> Name it exactly: service3.jpg
   - Service 4 (Active Aging) ==> Name it exactly: service4.jpg

4. GALLERY IMAGES:
   - Gallery 1 (Sensory)      ==> Name it exactly: gallery1.jpg
   - Gallery 2 (Gym)          ==> Name it exactly: gallery2.jpg
   - Gallery 3 (Gym)          ==> Name it exactly: gallery3.jpg
   - Gallery 4 (Classes)      ==> Name it exactly: gallery4.jpg
   - Gallery 5 (Sensory)      ==> Name it exactly: gallery5.jpg
   - Gallery 6 (Therapy)      ==> Name it exactly: gallery6.jpg

Once uploaded, the website will automatically detect your images and load them! If an image is missing or not uploaded yet, a beautiful fallback image from Unsplash is shown automatically.
